description: This scenario represents a stable sovereign environment with no major shocks across cyber, AI governance, legal, economic, or social domains. It serves as the reference baseline for comparative simulation analysis.

cyber_stability.description: No major cyber incidents; stable digital infrastructure and security posture

ai_governance.description: Regulated AI deployment with policy oversight and governance frameworks in place

legal_coherence.description: Strong rule-of-law environment with predictable regulatory enforcement

economic_resilience.description: Balanced macroeconomic performance with moderate growth and stability

social_stability.description: Low social unrest, stable public sentiment, and institutional trust

cyber_stability.impact: No change expected under stable conditions

social_stability.impact: No major social unrest or disruption

decision_integrity_score.impact: System remains within stable performance band

simulation_notes.purpose: Provides a benchmark reference for comparing stress scenarios such as cyber attacks, war, economic crises, and social instability
simulation_notes.interpretation: All deviations in other scenarios should be measured relative to this baseline state
simulation_notes.usage: Policy modeling, comparative analysis, and system validation
